criteria.criterionText: Then the report verdict should be BLOCKED
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The scenario 'Block empty report schema' could not be verified due to the absence of CLI evidence. The test requires execution of the report generator in a CI environment with an empty or no-required-fields report schema to confirm the expected verdict and finding codes.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide CLI evidence showing the execution of the report generator with an empty report schema, demonstrating the 'BLOCKED' verdict and the specified finding codes ('report-schema-empty', 'report-contract-not-enforced').
